questions.question: Welding karte samay sabse zaroori Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) kya hai?

options.B: Welding Helmet

questions.explanation: Welding karte samay aankhon ko arc rays aur sparks se bachane ke liye welding helmet sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher ka sahi type kaun sa hai jo welding workshop mein electrical fire (Class C) ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Foam Type

questions.explanation: CO2 type extinguisher electrical fires (Class C) ke liye effective hai kyunki yeh residue nahi chhodta aur non-conductive hota hai.

questions.question: Ek welder ko apne working area mein proper ventilation kyu maintain karna chahiye?

options.A: Taaki welding fumes se bacha ja sake
options.B: Taaki workshop thanda rahe

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation welding fumes ko remove karta hai jo health ke liye harmful ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Commonly use hone wala measuring tool jo metal sheets ki length aur width check karne ke liye kaam aata hai?

options.B: Micrometer

questions.explanation: Steel tape measure lambi measurements aur general layout ke liye sabse common aur convenient tool hai.

questions.question: Chhote aur intricate measurements jaise plate thickness ya rod diameter ke liye kaun sa tool best hai?

options.B: Vernier Caliper

questions.explanation: Vernier caliper high precision measurements ke liye use hota hai, jo steel rule se zyada accurate hota hai.

questions.question: Metal surface par marking karne ke liye kya use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Hammer

questions.explanation: Scriber ek sharp pointed tool hai jo metal surface par clear lines mark karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Kisi metal piece ko support aur hold karne ke liye konsa tool use hota hai jab uspar kaam kiya ja raha ho (jaise filing ya cutting)?

options.B: Welding Clamp

questions.explanation: Bench vice ek sturdy clamping device hai jo workpieces ko securely hold karta hai.

questions.question: Electrical shock se bachne ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Damaged cables se kaam karna
options.C: Properly insulated tools aur cables use karna

questions.explanation: Properly insulated tools aur cables electrical shock ke risk ko kam karte hain.

questions.question: Angle grinder use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Loose kapde pehenna

questions.explanation: Workpiece ko securely clamp karne se grinder slip nahi hota aur operator safe rehta hai.

questions.question: Welding fumes mein kaun se harmful substances ho sakte hain?

options.B: Carbon Monoxide aur Ozone

questions.explanation: Welding fumes mein carbon monoxide, ozone, aur various metal oxides jaise harmful gases ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Kisi bhi power tool ko use karne se pehle kya check karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Tool ka weight
options.C: Cable, plug aur switch ki condition

questions.explanation: Damaged cables, plugs ya switches electrical hazards create kar sakte hain. Always check before use.

questions.question: Welding arc se nikalne wali UV rays se bachne ke liye kya pehenna chahiye?

options.B: Clear safety glasses
options.C: Welding helmet with proper shade lens

questions.explanation: Welding helmet ka shade lens UV rays ko block karta hai aur aankhon ko damage se bachata hai.

questions.question: Hot metal ko handle karne ke liye kaun se gloves use karne chahiye?

options.B: Rubber gloves

questions.explanation: Leather welding gloves heat resistant hote hain aur hot metal se protection provide karte hain.

questions.question: Workshop mein oil spills ko immediately saaf karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki fire hazard na ho
options.C: Taaki koi slip hokar gire nahi

questions.explanation: Oil spills se fire hazard aur slipping hazard dono ho sakte hain, isliye unhe turant saaf karna chahiye.

questions.question: Try Square ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Angles check karna aur mark karna (90 degree)

questions.explanation: Try square metal pieces par 90 degree angles check karne aur mark karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Ek welder ko apne kapde kaise pehenne chahiye?

options.B: Tight aur synthetic fabric
options.C: Flame-resistant cotton ya leather, sleeves rolled down

questions.explanation: Flame-resistant kapde sparks aur heat se bachate hain, aur sleeves rolled down hone chahiye taaki skin exposed na ho.

questions.question: Welding area mein kis cheez ko store nahi karna chahiye?

options.B: Flammable liquids jaise paint thinner

questions.explanation: Welding ke sparks aur heat se flammable liquids mein aag lag sakti hai, isliye unhe welding area se door rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: SMAW ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Solid Metal Arc Welding

questions.explanation: SMAW ko 'Stick Welding' bhi kehte hain, aur iska full form Shielded Metal Arc Welding hai.

questions.question: SMAW mein arc ko maintain karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Proper arc length

questions.explanation: Ek stable aur consistent arc ke liye proper arc length maintain karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: E6013 electrode kis type ke material ke liye commonly use hota hai?

options.B: Cast Iron

questions.explanation: E6013 general purpose mild steel welding ke liye bahut popular electrode hai, jo easy-to-use hota hai.

questions.question: Welding current ki unit kya hai?

options.B: Ohms

questions.explanation: Welding current ko Amperes (Amps) mein measure kiya jata hai.

questions.question: AC welding machine ka ek fayda kya hai?

options.B: Arc blow ko kam karta hai

questions.explanation: AC welding machines arc blow ko kam karne mein madad karte hain, jo DC welding mein ek common problem hai.

questions.question: DCEN (Direct Current Electrode Negative) polarity mein heat kahan zyada generate hoti hai?

options.B: Workpiece par

questions.explanation: DCEN mein, current electrode se workpiece ki taraf flow karta hai, jisse workpiece par approximately 2/3 heat generate hoti hai.

questions.question: SMAW mein flux ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Molten weld pool ko atmospheric contamination se bachana

questions.explanation: Flux melt hokar shielding gas aur slag banata hai, jo molten weld pool ko oxygen aur nitrogen se bachata hai.

questions.question: Short arc length hone se kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Excessive spatter

questions.explanation: Bahut short arc length hone par electrode workpiece se touch kar sakta hai aur arc bujh sakta hai (sticking).

questions.question: Long arc length hone se kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Narrow bead

questions.explanation: Long arc length se shielding gas dissolve ho jata hai, jisse spatter badhta hai aur weld quality kharab hoti hai.

questions.question: E7018 electrode ki kya khas baat hai?

options.B: Low hydrogen electrode hai
options.D: AC power ke liye hi hai

questions.explanation: E7018 ek low hydrogen electrode hai, jo high strength welds aur crack resistance ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Welding ke baad slag ko remove karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki next pass kiya ja sake aur weld inspection ho sake

questions.explanation: Slag ko remove karne se agla weld pass properly deposit ho pata hai aur weld defects ko inspect kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Welding rod ko kis angle par hold karna chahiye?

options.B: 45 degrees workpiece se

questions.explanation: Typically, electrode ko 70-80 degree angle par hold kiya jata hai taaki proper penetration aur bead shape mil sake.

questions.question: Ek welding machine mein 'Duty Cycle' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Kitni der tak machine continuous weld kar sakti hai 10-minute cycle mein

questions.explanation: Duty cycle percentage mein batata hai ki ek machine 10-minute period mein kitni der tak rated output current par weld kar sakti hai overheat hue bina.

questions.question: Arc Welding mein 'Arc Blow' kya hai?

options.A: Arc ka bahut zyada heat produce karna
options.B: Magnetic forces ke karan arc ka deflected hona
options.D: Arc ka baar baar bujh jana

questions.explanation: Arc blow magnetic fields ke karan arc ka unstable ya deflected ho jana hai, jo DC welding mein common hai.

questions.question: SMAW mein kaun sa factor penetration ko directly affect karta hai?

options.B: Welding current (Amperage)

questions.explanation: Higher amperage zyada heat produce karta hai, jisse deeper penetration milti hai.

questions.question: Rutile electrodes (jaise E6013) ki kya khas baat hai?

options.B: Smooth arc aur easy slag removal

questions.explanation: Rutile electrodes smooth arc, easy slag removal, aur good bead appearance dete hain, making them user-friendly.

questions.question: Welding machine ke earth clamp ko kahan attach karna chahiye?

options.B: Workpiece ke jitna ho sake utna kareeb

questions.explanation: Earth clamp ko workpiece ke jitna ho sake utna kareeb attach karne se current path short hota hai aur arc stability badhti hai.

questions.question: Mild steel ko kaise identify kar sakte hain?

options.B: Iska surface bahut rough hota hai
options.C: Ismein magnet lagta hai aur yeh easily weld ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Mild steel ferromagnetic hota hai (magnet lagta hai) aur iski weldability achhi hoti hai.

questions.question: Stainless steel ki ek khas property kya hai?

options.B: Corrosion resistant hota hai

questions.explanation: Stainless steel mein chromium hota hai jo use corrosion resistant banata hai.

questions.question: Welding se pehle metal surfaces ko clean karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki weld defects jaise porosity aur poor fusion se bacha ja sake

questions.explanation: Oil, grease, rust ya paint jaise contaminants weld quality ko kharab karte hain aur defects create karte hain.

questions.question: Butt joint mein do metal pieces ko kaise rakha jata hai?

options.B: Ek doosre ke edge to edge
options.D: Parallel lekin thoda gap ke saath

questions.explanation: Butt joint mein do metal pieces ko same plane mein edge to edge rakha jata hai aur unke edges ko weld kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Lap joint mein metal pieces ko kaise place kiya jata hai?

options.A: Edges ek doosre se touch karte hue
options.B: Ek piece doosre ke upar overlap karta hua
options.C: 90 degree par ek doosre se milte hue

questions.explanation: Lap joint mein ek metal piece doosre ke upar overlap karta hai aur edges par weld kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Thick plates ko full penetration weld karne ke liye kaun sa edge preparation commonly use hota hai?

options.B: Bevel edge

questions.explanation: Bevel edge preparation thick plates mein deep penetration aur strong weld ke liye joint design mein space provide karta hai.

questions.question: Oxy-fuel cutting mein kaun si gases use hoti hain?

options.B: Oxygen aur Acetylene

questions.explanation: Oxy-fuel cutting mein oxygen aur fuel gas (jaise acetylene) ka mixture metal ko preheat aur cut karta hai.

questions.question: Grinding wheel se metal ko cut karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Safety glasses aur face shield pehenna

questions.explanation: Grinding se sparks aur metal particles udte hain, isliye aankhon aur chehre ko protect karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: T-joint mein do metal pieces kis angle par milte hain?

options.B: 45 degrees

questions.explanation: T-joint mein ek metal piece doosre ke surface par perpendicular (90 degrees) join hota hai.

questions.question: Welding se pehle joint edges ko 'root gap' kyu diya jata hai?

options.B: Taaki electrode easily enter ho sake aur full penetration mil sake

questions.explanation: Root gap proper penetration aur fusion ke liye zaroori hai, khas kar butt joints mein.

questions.question: Metal ko hacksaw se cut karte samay kya sahi technique hai?

options.B: Slow aur light pressure
options.C: Forward stroke par pressure aur return stroke par no pressure
options.D: Backward stroke par pressure aur forward stroke par no pressure

questions.explanation: Hacksaw blades cutting action forward stroke par karte hain, isliye pressure forward stroke par apply karna chahiye.

questions.question: Cast iron ki welding mein kya dikkat aati hai?

options.B: Ismein high carbon content hota hai, jisse yeh brittle hota hai aur crack hone ka risk hota hai

questions.explanation: Cast iron mein high carbon content use brittle banata hai, jisse welding ke dauran cracks ka risk badh jata hai. Pre-heating aur slow cooling zaroori hai.

questions.question: Welding se pehle metal surface se rust remove karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Wire brush ya grinder

questions.explanation: Wire brush ya grinder se rust aur scale ko effectively remove kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Fillet weld kis joint type par commonly use hota hai?

options.B: Lap joint aur T-joint
options.D: Corner joint, jab edges flush ho

questions.explanation: Fillet weld lap joints aur T-joints mein do surfaces ke beech ke angle mein banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Ek thin metal sheet ko cut karne ke liye sabse suitable method kya hai?

options.B: Plasma cutting

questions.explanation: Thin sheets ke liye manual hacksaw ya nibbler zyada precise aur kam heat input wali method hai, distortion kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Weld joint ki strength ko improve karne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Proper joint preparation aur sufficient weld metal deposition

questions.explanation: Achhi joint preparation aur proper amount mein weld metal deposit karne se joint ki strength badhti hai.

questions.question: Metal surface par paint ya coating hone se welding par kya asar padta hai?

options.B: Weld defects jaise porosity aur lack of fusion ho sakte hain
options.C: Welding process faster ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Paint aur coatings weld zone mein contaminants introduce karte hain, jisse porosity, lack of fusion aur fumes ki problems hoti hain.

questions.question: Layout marking ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai taaki metal sheet par precise lines banayi ja sake?

options.B: Punch

questions.explanation: Scriber aur steel rule ka combination precise marking ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Metal sheets ko manually bend karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Bench vice aur Hammer

questions.explanation: Chhote bends ke liye bench vice mein sheet ko clamp karke hammer se bend kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Burrs kya hote hain aur unhe kyu remove karna chahiye?

options.A: Yeh weld defects hain, unhe rehne dena chahiye
options.B: Yeh sharp metal edges hain, unhe safety aur fit-up ke liye remove karna chahiye
options.C: Yeh weld ko strong banate hain

questions.explanation: Burrs cutting ya grinding ke baad bache sharp edges hote hain, jo injuries cause kar sakte hain aur proper fit-up mein rukawat dal sakte hain.

questions.question: Tack welding ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Components ko temporarily hold karna aur unki alignment maintain karna

questions.explanation: Tack welds chhote, temporary welds hote hain jo components ko position mein rakhte hain final welding se pehle.

questions.question: Sheet metal ko straight line mein cut karne ke liye kaun sa manual tool use hota hai?

options.B: Tin snips (Sheet metal shears)

questions.explanation: Tin snips ya sheet metal shears thin sheets ko straight aur curved lines mein cut karne ke liye designed hote hain.

questions.question: Holes drill karne se pehle kya karna zaroori hai?

options.A: Directly drill karna shuru kar dena
options.B: Center punch se mark karna

questions.explanation: Center punch se mark karne se drill bit apni jagah par rehti hai aur slip nahi hoti.

questions.question: Metal ko smooth finish dene ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: File

questions.explanation: Files metal surfaces ko smooth karne, burrs remove karne aur shapes refine karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Fitting up operations mein components ko align karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Squares, clamps aur levels

questions.explanation: Squares, clamps, aur levels components ko correct position aur angle mein hold karne aur align karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Distortion ko kam karne ke liye kya technique use hoti hai during welding?

options.B: Intermittent welding aur proper clamping

questions.explanation: Intermittent welds (skip welding) aur strong clamping metal ko warp hone se bachate hain. Pre-setting aur balanced welding bhi helpful hai.

questions.question: Grinding karte samay guard ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Sparks aur debris se operator ko protect karna

questions.explanation: Guard operator ko flying sparks, debris aur wheel rupture se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Drill bit ko workpiece par kyu press karna chahiye?

options.A: Taaki drill bit garam ho jaye
options.B: Taaki cutting action ho aur chips remove ho

questions.explanation: Proper pressure apply karne se drill bit material ko cut karti hai aur chips remove karti hai, jisse efficient drilling hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek welder ko apne tools ko kaise maintain karna chahiye?

options.B: Regularly clean karna, inspect karna aur sharpen karna
options.D: Dusre welders ke tools use karna

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance se tools ki life badhti hai, performance achhi rehti hai aur safety maintain hoti hai.

questions.question: Marking fluid (Layout dye) ka kya use hai fabrication mein?

options.B: Metal par temporary lines banana
options.C: Metal surface ko dark karna taaki scribed lines clearly dikhein

questions.explanation: Layout dye metal surface ko blue ya black kar deta hai, jisse scriber se banayi gayi shiny lines clearly visible hoti hain.

questions.question: Sheet metal bending ke liye 'bending brake' machine ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Accurate aur sharp bends banata hai
options.C: Sirf bahut thick metal bend karta hai
options.D: Welding ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: Bending brake (ya press brake) machine sheet metal mein precise aur sharp angles banane ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Pipes ko cut karne ke liye kaun sa tool use ho sakta hai?

options.B: Pipe cutter ya hacksaw

questions.explanation: Pipe cutter pipes ko clean aur straight cut karne ke liye designed hai, hacksaw bhi use ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Welding fixture ka kya role hai fabrication mein?

options.B: Workpieces ko accurately position aur hold karna welding ke dauran

questions.explanation: Welding fixtures repeated aur accurate assembly ke liye components ko sahi jagah par hold karte hain, distortion bhi kam karte hain.

questions.question: Workpiece ko clean aur dry rakhna kyu important hai fabrication se pehle?

options.B: Taaki marking clear dikhe aur contamination na ho

questions.explanation: Clean aur dry surface par marking clear hoti hai, aur welding ke dauran contamination se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Weld mein 'Porosity' kya hai?

options.A: Weld bead ka bahut mota hona
options.B: Weld metal ke andar trapped gas bubbles

questions.explanation: Porosity weld metal mein gas bubbles ka trap ho jana hai, jo shielding ki kami ya contaminated material se hota hai.

questions.question: 'Undercut' kya hai?

options.A: Weld metal ka base metal ke upar flow karna
options.B: Base metal mein ek groove ya notch jo weld toe ke paas banta hai
options.C: Weld metal ka joint se bahar nikalna
options.D: Weld ka bahut zyada penetrate karna

questions.explanation: Undercut base metal mein ek notch hai jo weld toe ke paas banta hai, jisse strength kam hoti hai. High current ya wrong angle se hota hai.

questions.question: 'Lack of Fusion' kya hai?

options.A: Do weld passes ka achhe se mix hona
options.B: Weld metal ka base metal ya previous weld pass ke saath properly fuse na hona

questions.explanation: Lack of fusion tab hota hai jab weld metal base metal ya previous weld pass ke saath achhe se bond nahi ho pata, jisse weak spots bante hain.

questions.question: Welding mein 'Distortion' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Weld bead ka colour change hona
options.B: Heat ke karan metal component ki shape ya dimension mein change aana
options.C: Weld metal ka hard ho jana
options.D: Weld ka bahut zyada smooth hona

questions.explanation: Welding heat ke karan metal expand aur contract karta hai, jisse component ki original shape mein badlav aa sakta hai.

questions.question: 'Slag Inclusion' kya hai?

options.A: Weld metal ka bahut clean hona
options.B: Non-metallic material (slag) ka weld metal ke andar trap ho jana

questions.explanation: Slag inclusion tab hota hai jab slag weld metal mein trap ho jata hai, usually improper cleaning ya high travel speed ke karan.

questions.question: Visual inspection mein kya check kiya jata hai?

options.B: Weld bead ka appearance, size, shape aur surface defects

questions.explanation: Visual inspection mein weld surface par dikhne wale defects jaise undercut, porosity, crack, aur bead profile check kiye jate hain.

questions.question: Excessive travel speed se kya defect ho sakta hai?

options.B: Lack of penetration aur narrow weld bead

questions.explanation: Agar travel speed bahut zyada ho, toh weld metal ko proper penetration aur fusion ke liye enough time nahi milta.

questions.question: Too low amperage se kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Lack of penetration, poor fusion aur electrode sticking

questions.explanation: Kam amperage se heat input kam hota hai, jisse weld metal properly melt nahi hota aur penetration kam rehti hai.

questions.question: Welding mein 'Cracks' kyu aate hain?

options.B: High carbon content, rapid cooling, ya excessive stress ke karan
options.C: Weld ka bahut zyada mota hona

questions.explanation: Cracks high stress, inappropriate material, improper pre-heat/post-heat, ya rapid cooling ke karan aate hain.

questions.question: Weld bead ki uniformity kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Stress distribution aur strength maintain karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Uniform weld bead stress ko evenly distribute karta hai aur joint ki strength ko maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Welding ke baad 'spatter' kya hota hai?

options.A: Weld metal ka ek smooth surface
options.B: Chhote metal particles jo weld area ke aas-paas chipak jate hain

questions.explanation: Spatter molten metal ke chhote droplets hote hain jo arc se bahar nikal kar workpiece par ya aas-paas chipak jate hain.

questions.question: Spatter ko kam karne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Proper arc length, current setting aur electrode angle maintain karna

questions.explanation: Correct welding parameters maintain karne se spatter ko kafi had tak control kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Welding mein 'Burn-through' kya hai?

options.B: Molten weld metal ka workpiece ke through pass ho jana, jisse hole ban jata hai

questions.explanation: Burn-through tab hota hai jab high heat input ya thin material ke karan weld metal workpiece se poora nikal jata hai.

questions.question: Welding defects ko avoid karne ke liye sabse important step kya hai?

options.B: Proper joint preparation aur correct welding parameters set karna

questions.explanation: Achhi joint preparation aur sahi welding parameters defects ko minimize karne ki key hain.

questions.question: Weld bead ki convex (bahar ki taraf ubhri hui) shape kis baat ka indication ho sakti hai?

options.B: Insufficient heat input ya too fast travel speed

questions.explanation: Excessive convexity (over-reinforcement) usually insufficient heat input ya fast travel speed ke karan hoti hai, jisse weld profile achha nahi banta.

questions.question: Visual inspection ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Welding gauge

questions.explanation: Welding gauge weld bead size, fillet weld leg length, throat thickness, undercut aur misalignment jaise parameters ko measure karta hai.

questions.question: MIG welding ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Metal Inert Gas

questions.explanation: MIG welding ko Metal Inert Gas welding ya GMAW (Gas Metal Arc Welding) bhi kehte hain.

questions.question: MIG welding mein shielding gas ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Atmospheric contamination se weld pool ko protect karna

questions.explanation: Shielding gas oxygen aur nitrogen ko weld area se door rakhta hai, jisse weld defects nahi aate.

questions.question: TIG welding ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Thin Inert Gas

questions.explanation: TIG welding ko Tungsten Inert Gas welding ya GTAW (Gas Tungsten Arc Welding) bhi kehte hain.

questions.question: TIG welding mein kaun sa electrode use hota hai?

options.B: Non-consumable tungsten electrode

questions.explanation: TIG welding mein non-consumable tungsten electrode use hota hai, aur filler rod alag se feed kiya jata hai.

questions.question: MIG welding ka ek major advantage kya hai?

options.B: High deposition rate aur continuous wire feed

questions.explanation: MIG welding high deposition rate aur continuous wire feed ke karan faster hai, jisse productivity badhti hai.

questions.question: TIG welding ka primary advantage kya hai?

options.B: High quality, precise welds aur no spatter/slag

questions.explanation: TIG welding sabse clean aur precise welds deta hai, jo critical applications ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Welding machine ke cables ko kaise maintain karna chahiye?

options.B: Regularly inspect karna aur damaged cables ko replace karna

questions.explanation: Damaged cables electrical hazards create kar sakte hain aur poor weld performance de sakte hain.

questions.question: Workshop mein tools ko organize karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki tools easily mil sakein aur accidents kam ho

questions.explanation: Organized tools se efficiency badhti hai aur tripping hazards kam hote hain.

questions.question: Gas cylinders ko kaise store karna chahiye?

options.B: Vertically aur chain se secure karke

questions.explanation: Gas cylinders ko vertically store karna chahiye aur chain se secure karna chahiye taaki woh gir na sakein.

questions.question: Welding torch ke nozzles ko regularly clean karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki proper shielding gas flow aur arc stability maintain ho

questions.explanation: Clogged nozzles shielding gas flow ko disrupt karte hain aur weld quality ko affect karte hain.

questions.question: Basic blueprint reading mein welding symbol ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.A: Weld ki location aur type batana
options.B: Welder ka naam batana

questions.explanation: Welding symbols drawings par weld type, size, location aur other details ko graphically represent karte hain.

questions.question: Welding workshop mein 'good housekeeping' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Regularly clean karna, tools ko organize karna aur hazards ko remove karna
options.D: Sirf welding machine ko saaf karna

questions.explanation: Good housekeeping ek safe aur efficient working environment banata hai.

questions.question: Welding machine ke cooling system ko kyu maintain karna chahiye?

options.B: Taaki machine overheat na ho aur uski life badhe
options.D: Cooling system ka koi kaam nahi

questions.explanation: Proper cooling machine ko overheating se bachata hai, jisse uski efficiency aur lifespan badhti hai.

questions.question: Material handling ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper lifting techniques use karna ya lifting equipment ka sahara lena
options.C: Rough surface par material drag karna

questions.explanation: Proper material handling techniques aur equipment se back injuries aur accidents se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Welding ke liye 'Consumables' kya hote hain?

options.B: Shielding gas, electrodes, filler wires jo welding process mein consume ho jate hain

questions.explanation: Consumables woh materials hain jo welding process ke dauran use ho jate hain aur unhe regularly replace karna padta hai.

questions.question: Ek welding technician ke liye continuous learning kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Kyuki usko naye tools nahi sikhne
options.B: Industry mein naye processes aur materials aate rehte hain, skills ko up-to-date rakhne ke liye
options.C: Kyuki usko bas ek hi kaam karna hai
options.D: Kyuki usko sab kuch aata hai

questions.explanation: Welding industry constantly evolve karti hai, isliye up-to-date rehne ke liye continuous learning essential hai.
